issue_title: ArgumentCaptor no longer working for varargs
issue_description: I ran into the issue described here: http://stackoverflow.com/questions/27303562/why-does-upgrading-mockito-from-1-9-5-to-1-10-8-break-this-captor

/**
* Finds the generic type (parametrized type) of the field. If the field is not generic it returns Object.class.
*
* @param field
* @return
*/
